title: Council agent analysis
description: Structured analysis a deep-execution provider agent returns after querying its provider. Enforced by scripts/validate-analysis.sh; replies that fail validation are rendered raw, never silently accepted.

quality.description: Honest assessment of the provider response; good means genuinely useful

retried.description: Whether a follow-up query was needed to fill gaps

key_recommendations.description: Most actionable recommendations from the response

unique_perspective.description: What this provider brings that others might miss

blind_spots.description: What the response is not considering; assumptions it makes

full_response.description: Complete, unedited provider response text (best response if retried)
